subject: fix(theme): use querySelectorAll for meta theme-color, reorder Key Lessons, add PWA cross-ref
body:
Fixes a semantic bug where querySelector only returned the first of two
meta theme-color tags, leaving the second stale and potentially
conflicting with the active theme. Switched to querySelectorAll with
forEach to update all matching tags.

Also reorganizes 16 Key Lessons into logical groups (Foundations, HTML &
browser chrome, CSS & Tailwind, Storage & sync, React Native) and adds
a cross-reference in the PWA System section linking manifest theme_color
to the dynamic meta updates in the Theme & Dark Mode section.

Tags: documentation, theme, dark-mode, bugfix, querySelectorAll
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: patch
